@context.label: The Hydra Core Vocabulary
@context.comment: A lightweight vocabulary for hypermedia-driven Web APIs
@context.dc:description: The Hydra Core Vocabulary is a lightweight vocabulary to create hypermedia-driven Web APIs. By specifying a number of concepts commonly used in Web APIs it enables the creation of generic API clients.
@context.dc:rights: Copyright © 2012-2014 the Contributors to the Hydra Core Vocabulary Specification

defines.label: Hydra Resource
defines.comment: The class of dereferenceable resources by means a client can attempt to dereference; however, the received responses should still be verified.

defines.label: Hydra Class
defines.comment: The class of Hydra classes.

defines.label: Link
defines.comment: The class of properties representing links.

defines.label: apiDocumentation
defines.comment: A link to the API documentation

defines.label: ApiDocumentation
defines.comment: The Hydra API documentation class

defines.label: entrypoint
defines.comment: A link to main entry point of the Web API

defines.label: supported classes
defines.comment: A class known to be supported by the Web API

defines.label: possible status
defines.comment: A status that might be returned by the Web API (other statuses should be expected and properly handled as well)

defines.label: supported properties
defines.comment: The properties known to be supported by a Hydra class

defines.label: Supported Property
defines.comment: A property known to be supported by a Hydra class.

defines.label: property
defines.comment: A property

defines.label: required
defines.comment: True if the property is required, false otherwise.

defines.label: readable
defines.comment: True if the client can retrieve the property's value, false otherwise.

defines.label: writable
defines.comment: True if the client can change the property's value, false otherwise.

defines.label: writable
defines.comment: This property is left for compatibility purposes and hydra:writable should be used instead.

defines.label: supported operation
defines.comment: An operation supported by instances of the specific Hydra class, or the target of the Hydra link, or IRI template.

defines.label: operation
defines.comment: An operation supported by the Hydra resource

defines.label: Operation
defines.comment: An operation.

defines.label: method
defines.comment: The HTTP method.

defines.label: expects
defines.comment: The information expected by the Web API.

defines.label: returns
defines.comment: The information returned by the Web API on success

defines.label: Status code description
defines.comment: Additional information about a status code that might be returned.

defines.label: status code
defines.comment: The HTTP status code. Please note it may happen this value will be different to actual status code received.

defines.label: title
defines.comment: A title, often used along with a description.

defines.label: description
defines.comment: A description.

defines.label: Error
defines.comment: A runtime error, used to report information beyond the returned status code.

defines.label: Collection
defines.comment: A collection holding references to a number of related resources.

defines.label: collection
defines.comment: Collections somehow related to this resource.

defines.label: member assertion
defines.comment: Semantics of each member provided by the collection.

defines.label: manages
defines.comment: This predicate is left for compatibility purposes and hydra:memberAssertion should be used instead.

defines.label: subject
defines.comment: The subject.

defines.label: object
defines.comment: The object.

defines.label: member
defines.comment: A member of the collection

defines.label: view
defines.comment: A specific view of a resource.

defines.label: PartialCollectionView
defines.comment: A PartialCollectionView describes a partial view of a Collection. Multiple PartialCollectionViews can be connected with the the next/previous properties to allow a client to retrieve all members of the collection.

defines.label: total items
defines.comment: The total number of items referenced by a collection.

defines.label: first
defines.comment: The first resource of an interlinked set of resources.

defines.label: last
defines.comment: The last resource of an interlinked set of resources.

defines.label: next
defines.comment: The resource following the current instance in an interlinked set of resources.

defines.label: previous
defines.comment: The resource preceding the current instance in an interlinked set of resources.

defines.label: search
defines.comment: A IRI template that can be used to query a collection.

defines.label: freetext query
defines.comment: A property representing a freetext query.

defines.label: Templated Link
defines.comment: A templated link.

defines.label: IRI Template
defines.comment: The class of IRI templates.

defines.label: template
defines.comment: A templated string with placeholders. The literal's datatype indicates the template syntax; if not specified, hydra:Rfc6570Template is assumed.

defines.label: RFC6570 IRI template
defines.comment: An IRI template as defined by RFC6570.

defines.label: variable representation
defines.comment: The representation format to use when expanding the IRI template.

defines.label: VariableRepresentation
defines.comment: A representation specifies how to serialize variable values into strings.

defines.label: BasicRepresentation
defines.comment: A representation that serializes just the lexical form of a variable value, but omits language and type information.

defines.label: ExplicitRepresentation
defines.comment: A representation that serializes a variable value including its language and type information and thus differentiating between IRIs and literals.

defines.label: mapping
defines.comment: A variable-to-property mapping of the IRI template.

defines.label: IriTemplateMapping
defines.comment: A mapping from an IRI template variable to a property.

defines.label: variable
defines.comment: An IRI template variable

defines.label: Base Uri source
defines.comment: Provides a base abstract for base Uri source for Iri template resolution.

defines.label: RFC 3986 based
defines.comment: States that the base Uri should be established using RFC 3986 reference resolution algorithm specified in section 5.

defines.label: Link context
defines.comment: States that the link's context IRI, as defined in RFC 5988, should be used as the base Uri

defines.label: skip
defines.comment: Instructs to skip N elements of the set.

defines.label: take
defines.comment: Instructs to limit set only to N elements.

defines.label: page index
defines.comment: Instructs to provide a specific page of the collection at a given index.

defines.label: page reference
defines.comment: Instructs to provide a specific page reference of the collection.

defines.label: returns header
defines.comment: Name of the header returned by the operation.

defines.label: expects header
defines.comment: Specification of the header expected by the operation.

defines.label: Header specification
defines.comment: Specifies a possible either expected or returned header values

defines.label: header name
defines.comment: Name of the header.

defines.label: possible header value
defines.comment: Possible value of the header.

defines.label: closed set
defines.comment: Determines whether the provided set of header values is closed or not.

defines.label: extension
defines.comment: Hint on what kind of extensions are in use.

title: Fireguard Auth API
description: OAuth2 and OpenID Connect Authorization Server

supportedProperty.title: title
supportedProperty.description: A short, human-readable summary of the problem.

supportedProperty.title: detail
supportedProperty.description: A human-readable explanation specific to this occurrence of the problem.

supportedProperty.title: instance
supportedProperty.description: A URI reference that identifies the specific occurrence of the problem. It may or may not yield further information if dereferenced.

supportedProperty.title: type
supportedProperty.description: A URI reference that identifies the problem type

supportedClass.title: Permission

supportedProperty.title: created_at
supportedProperty.description: ISO 8601 datetime when the permission was created

supportedClass.description: Permission management. Permissions define specific access rights.

supportedClass.title: Role

supportedProperty.title: name
supportedProperty.description: Role name (lowercase letters, numbers, and underscores)

supportedProperty.title: is_system
supportedProperty.description: Indicates if this is a system role (protected from deletion)

supportedProperty.title: permissions
supportedProperty.description: List of permissions assigned to this role

supportedProperty.title: created_at
supportedProperty.description: ISO 8601 datetime when the role was created

supportedClass.description: Role-Based Access Control (RBAC) role management. Roles group permissions together.

supportedClass.title: AuditEvent

supportedProperty.title: actorEmail
supportedProperty.description: Actor email (optional, depending on PII settings).

supportedProperty.title: ipAddress
supportedProperty.description: Client IP address (optional, depending on PII settings).

supportedProperty.title: occurredAt
supportedProperty.description: ISO 8601 datetime when the event occurred.

supportedProperty.title: recordedAt
supportedProperty.description: ISO 8601 datetime when the event was recorded.

supportedProperty.title: sequence
supportedProperty.description: Monotonic sequence number within the chain.

supportedProperty.title: prevHash
supportedProperty.description: Previous event hash in the chain.

supportedClass.description: Audit ledger events for security and compliance.

supportedClass.title: Client

supportedProperty.title: is_active
supportedProperty.description: Whether the client is currently active

supportedClass.description: OAuth2 client application management. Clients are applications that can request access tokens.

supportedClass.title: Challenge
supportedClass.description: OTP challenge management for verification and 2FA.

supportedClass.title: Session

supportedProperty.title: ipAddress
supportedProperty.description: Client IP address for the session.

supportedProperty.title: createdAt
supportedProperty.description: ISO 8601 datetime when the session was created.

supportedProperty.title: lastActivityAt
supportedProperty.description: ISO 8601 datetime of the last activity.

supportedProperty.title: isCurrent
supportedProperty.description: Whether this session is the current one.

supportedClass.description: User session management. Sessions track user authentication state across devices.

supportedClass.title: Tenant

supportedProperty.title: requirePkce
supportedProperty.description: Whether PKCE is required for OAuth2 flows.

supportedProperty.title: allowedScopes
supportedProperty.description: Allowed OAuth2 scopes for this tenant.

supportedProperty.title: customIssuer
supportedProperty.description: Custom issuer URL for this tenant.

supportedProperty.title: createdAt
supportedProperty.description: ISO 8601 datetime when the tenant was created.

supportedClass.description: Multi-tenant configuration management. Tenants define OAuth2 settings for different organizations.

supportedProperty.title: lastUsedAt
supportedProperty.description: Last time the device was used.

supportedProperty.title: createdAt
supportedProperty.description: ISO 8601 datetime when the user was created.

supportedProperty.title: lastLoginAt
supportedProperty.description: ISO 8601 datetime of the last login.

supportedOperation.description: Retrieves the collection of Permission resources.
supportedOperation.title: getPermissionCollection

supportedOperation.description: Retrieves the collection of Role resources.
supportedOperation.title: getRoleCollection

supportedOperation.description: Retrieves the collection of AuditEvent resources.
supportedOperation.title: getAuditEventCollection

supportedOperation.description: Retrieves the collection of Client resources.
supportedOperation.title: getClientCollection

supportedOperation.description: Retrieves the collection of Session resources.
supportedOperation.title: getSessionCollection

supportedOperation.description: Retrieves the collection of Tenant resources.
supportedOperation.title: getTenantCollection

supportedOperation.description: Retrieves the collection of TrustedDevice resources.
supportedOperation.title: getTrustedDeviceCollection

supportedOperation.description: Retrieves the collection of User resources.
supportedOperation.title: getUserCollection

supportedProperty.title: propertyPath
supportedProperty.description: The property path of the violation

supportedProperty.title: message
supportedProperty.description: The message associated with the violation
